creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for your report.  It has arrived safely.

I don't believe this issue warrants a security advisory according to the guidelines on https://www.freebsd.org/security/.  We don't generally issue a security advisory if an issue requires privilege or a non-default configuration to manifest.  The rationale being that privileged users have easier tools at their disposal to compromise the system.

Having said that: this is clearly a bug that should be fixed.

Please let us know if you disagree that this issue should be public.
